verdict.answer_first: A leads cleaner: "Postgres." then the bottom line; B also answers first with "pick Postgres" but with more framing.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits harder: "it's the stronger default — and it's not particularly close"; B adds broader option mapping under "When MongoDB" and "caveat".
verdict.fabrication: B is more exposed: "slow at scale" and "hundreds-of-millions-to-billions" are asserted without evidence; A has fewer unsupported thresholds.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on: "Start there, add materialized views / TimescaleDB... graduate to... OLAP store" gives a clearer path.
